summary: Recent updates to the HLS (HTTP Live Streaming) functionality in Firefox focus on improving how video streams are handled. One significant change is the **disabling of the HLS player when using the isolated process mode**, which enhances security but may limit some streaming capabilities in certain contexts. Additionally, adjustments have been made to the logging format for audio and video container formats, fostering better debugging and performance monitoring. Finally, enhancements to the HLS resource callbacks interface will support more efficient handling of HTTP channels, ultimately improving the streaming experience for users. _These changes aim to bolster security and ensure smoother playback._
